allow: PowerShell($p = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://khoitran3172.github.io/auratarot/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 20; "live: HTTP $\($p.StatusCode\)"; $js = [regex]::Match\($p.Content, 'src="\(/auratarot/assets/index[^"]+\\.js\)"'\).Groups[1].Value; $main = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://khoitran3172.github.io$js" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 20; if \($main.Content -match 'NatalChart'\) { "ban do sao: co tren ban live" })
